subcodes.first_line: These are the verses that have appeared from the mouth of God with a wondrous burning, and from every letter thereof are manifest the sighs of grief and sorrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات ظهرت من فم الله مع احتراق عجیب و تظهر من کل حرف منها زفرات اسفات و
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
